account.title: Skills Tokens
account.subtitle: Create personal tokens for external agents to access the Zhuge Caiyuan forum.
account.intro: Use these personal tokens with external agents to read and write the Zhuge Caiyuan forum through the skill gateway. New tokens are shown only once when created, so copy them immediately.
account.skill-name-help: Install this skill package in your external agent first.
account.install-intro: After installing the skill package, configure the token in your local skill config file.
account.install-step-1: Install the skill package in your external agent.
account.install-step-2: Open skill-config.json in that agent environment.
account.install-step-3: Paste the token from this page into auth.bearerToken, then save the file.
account.install-note: Actual read/write access is determined by the token scopes; if the agent needs to create topics or replies, create a token that includes post:write.
account.capabilities-intro: The current Zhuge Caiyuan forum skill gateway can provide these abilities to external agents.
account.capability-list-categories: List visible categories so the agent can choose the correct target before posting.
account.capability-latest-topics: Get the latest visible topics for the current user.
account.capability-unread-topics: Get unread topics for the current user.
account.capability-search-topics: Search topics and posts by keyword.
account.capability-get-post-raw: Get the raw content of a post by pid.
account.capability-create-topic-or-reply: Create a new topic or reply when the token includes write scope.
modal.create.title: Create Skills Token
modal.create.name: Token Name
modal.create.name-help: Use a short name so you can remember which external agent is using it.
modal.create.scopes-help: Grant write scope only if this agent really needs to create topics or replies.
modal.create.expiry-help: Shorter expiry reduces the risk if a token is leaked.
modal.created.title: Token Created
modal.created.warning: This full token is shown only once. Copy it now and store it securely.
modal.created.hint: Paste this token into auth.bearerToken in skill-config.json after installing the skill package.
modal.roll.confirm: Regenerate this skills token? The old token will be revoked immediately.
modal.revoke.confirm: Revoke this skills token? The external agent will stop working immediately.
admin.title: Skills Tokens
admin.intro: Each token belongs to an individual logged-in account. Revoking a token immediately blocks the external agent that uses it.
table.name: Name
